arts.ttl: Jose Mourinho Reflects on Turning Down Real Madrid’s Offer to Stay
arts.sum: Did Jose Mourinho pave the way for Real Madrid’s Champions League success? His exit paved the way for Carlo Ancelotti, who would lead Real Madrid to La Décima, their long-awaited 10th Champions League title, in 2014.

That is according to Cadena SER, who say Real Madrid will not go any further than that and wait for the summer if Liverpool continue to say no.
